title: Ratchet Plan
description: Ratchet epic plan — milestones, issues, discoveries, and current focus tracking for .ratchet/plan.yaml

phase.description: Ordered development phase — plan -> test -> build -> review -> harden

phase_status_value.description: Status of a single phase within a pipeline

issue_status.description: Overall issue status — blocked/escalated/failed indicate early pipeline exit

discovery_status.description: Discovery lifecycle status — pending (new), done (resolved), promoted (converted to issue), dismissed (non-actionable)

discovery_severity.description: Severity of the discovery — critical blocks progress, info is just a note

discovery_source.description: How the discovery was created — manual (sidequest skill), watch (CI/PR monitor), tighten (retrospective), retro (retrospective analysis)

name.description: Epic name — the project or body of work being tracked

description.description: Brief description of the epic's goals

progress_ref.description: GitHub issue number for the plan tracking issue, or null if no progress adapter

milestones.description: Ordered list of milestones in this epic

current_focus.description: Currently active milestone and phase, or null if no work is in progress

discoveries.description: Sidequests and findings discovered during work — logged by /ratchet:sidequest, /ratchet:watch, and /ratchet:tighten

milestone_id.description: ID of the milestone currently being worked on

phase.description: Current phase within the focused milestone

started.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when focus was set

done_when.description: Concrete acceptance criteria — when is this milestone complete?

depends_on.description: Milestone IDs that must complete before this one can start (DAG mode)

regressions.description: Count of phase regressions consumed by this milestone

github_issue.description: GitHub issue number this milestone tracks as a parent issue, or null

progress_ref.description: Progress adapter reference for this milestone (e.g., GitHub issue number)

pairs.description: Pair names assigned to this milestone

issues.description: Issues within this milestone — each progresses through its own phase pipeline

phase_status_map.description: Status of each phase in the pipeline

ref.description: Issue reference — local string (e.g., 'issue-2-1') or numeric GitHub issue number

pairs.description: Pair names assigned to this issue

depends_on.description: Issue refs that must complete before this one can start

phase_status.description: Per-phase pipeline status for this issue

files.description: Files created or modified by this issue's pipeline (populated at completion)

debates.description: Debate IDs from this issue's pipeline (populated at completion)

branch.description: Git branch name for this issue's worktree, or null if not yet started

pr.description: Pull request number, or null if not yet created

progress_ref.description: GitHub issue number for this issue (if promoted), or null

description.description: Full description of what was discovered

issue_ref.description: Issue ref if this discovery was promoted to an issue, or null

milestone.description: Milestone ID this discovery relates to, or null

issue.description: Issue ref this discovery relates to, or null

debate.description: Active debate ID when discovery was logged, or null

context.description: Context in which the discovery was made

pairs.description: Pair names relevant to this discovery

retro_type.description: Retrospective category if created by tighten, or null

affected_scope.description: File glob pattern of affected scope, or null

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the discovery was created
